description: Extended session crossing 2 compaction boundaries — tests degradation

turns.content: Let's build a magic system. It's called Resonance. Casters attune to one of 5 Harmonics: Fire, Frost, Storm, Earth, Shadow.
Created Resonance magic system with 5 Harmonics.

Each Harmonic has a physical manifestation. Fire casters' eyes glow amber. Frost casters have pale blue skin markings. Storm casters' hair stands on end. Earth casters develop stone-like calluses. Shadow casters' pupils become slitted.
Documented physical manifestations for all 5 Harmonics.
Attunement happens at age 13 in a ceremony called the Harmonic Trial. About 1 in 50 people can attune.
Documented Harmonic Trial at age 13, 1-in-50 rate.
Dual attunement is extremely rare — 1 in 10,000. The last known dual was Archmage Voss who wielded Storm and Shadow 200 years ago.
Documented dual attunement rarity and Archmage Voss.
Overuse of Resonance causes Harmonic Sickness. Symptoms: nosebleeds, tremors, temporary blindness. Lethal if pushed past the threshold.
Created Harmonic Sickness with symptoms and lethality threshold.
The governing body for magic is the Concordance, based in the Crystal Spire. Five Archons, one per Harmonic.
Created the Concordance and Crystal Spire. 5 Archons.
Current Fire Archon: Pyrra Ashcrown. Frost: Thane Iceweaver. Storm: Zara Thundercall. Earth: Gorim Deeproot. Shadow: position vacant after Archon Nyx disappeared 2 years ago.
Documented all 5 Archon positions. Shadow Archon Nyx missing 2 years.
Resonance requires a focus object. Common foci: rings, amulets, staves. Rare foci: tattoos (permanent, can't be disarmed).
Documented focus objects and tattoo foci.
There's an anti-magic material called Nullstone. Found only in the Voidchasms. Nullstone disrupts Resonance within a 10-meter radius.
Created Nullstone from Voidchasms, 10m anti-magic radius.
The Hollowed from the Whispering Woods have been corrupting Resonance. Corrupted Resonance turns purple and drives casters insane.
Linked Hollowed corruption to Resonance. Purple corruption = madness.
A resistance group called the Untuned fights against Resonance discrimination. They're non-casters who believe magic creates inequality.
Created the Untuned resistance movement.
The Untuned leader is Marcus Grimm, a former soldier who lost his family to a Fire Harmonic accident.
Created Marcus Grimm, Untuned leader, backstory.
Resonance energy can be stored in Harmonic Crystals. Each crystal holds about 3 days of casting power. They're expensive — 50 gold Aurens each.
Documented Harmonic Crystals: 3-day storage, 50 Aurens cost.
The most powerful Resonance spell ever cast was the Worldshield — a Storm+Earth dual spell that protected Solara during the War of Broken Oaths.
Documented the Worldshield spell and its War of Broken Oaths context.
Young casters train at the Academy of Harmonics in Solara. 4-year program. Graduation ceremony is called the Final Resonance.
Created Academy of Harmonics, 4-year program, Final Resonance graduation.
There are Resonance-enhanced weapons called Harmonic Arms. The most famous is Stormbreaker, a warhammer that generates lightning on impact.
Created Harmonic Arms concept and Stormbreaker warhammer.
Shadow Resonance is controversial. 3 of the 5 Archons want to ban Shadow attunement. Pyrra and Zara support the ban.
Documented Shadow ban controversy. Pyrra and Zara favor ban.
The Voidchasms (where Nullstone is found) are also the suspected origin of the Hollowed corruption.
Linked Voidchasms to both Nullstone and Hollowed corruption origin.
Ancient texts mention a 6th Harmonic: Light. It hasn't been seen in 1000 years. The Crystal Spire was supposedly built using Light Resonance.
Documented the lost 6th Harmonic: Light. Crystal Spire connection.

facts.fact: 5 Harmonics: Fire, Frost, Storm, Earth, Shadow
Fire = amber eyes, Frost = blue markings, Storm = standing hair, Earth = stone calluses, Shadow = slitted pupils
Harmonic Trial at age 13, 1-in-50 can attune
Dual attunement: 1 in 10,000. Last was Archmage Voss (Storm+Shadow) 200 years ago
Harmonic Sickness: nosebleeds, tremors, blindness, potentially lethal
Concordance: 5 Archons in Crystal Spire, one per Harmonic
Archons: Pyrra (Fire), Thane (Frost), Zara (Storm), Gorim (Earth), Shadow vacant since Nyx disappeared 2 years ago
Focus objects required. Tattoo foci are permanent and rare.
Nullstone from Voidchasms disrupts Resonance in 10m radius
Hollowed corrupt Resonance to purple, causes madness
The Untuned: anti-magic resistance led by Marcus Grimm
Harmonic Crystals: 3-day storage, 50 gold Aurens each
Worldshield: Storm+Earth dual spell protected Solara during War of Broken Oaths
Academy of Harmonics: 4-year program, Final Resonance graduation
Stormbreaker: lightning warhammer, most famous Harmonic Arm
Shadow ban: Pyrra and Zara favor banning Shadow attunement
6th Harmonic (Light) lost for 1000 years, Crystal Spire built with it
